# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the current working-tree diff only. The only changed files are `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/run.json`, which contain orchestrator metadata entries for final-review resumption and not runtime/source code behavior. I did not find any concrete correctness, safety, or robustness regressions in the staged implementation logic from this patch.

## Amendments

None.
